title: A Maker of Pet Toys in Ukraine Turns to Killer Drones
summary_full: An entrepreneur behind drones that make the final strike themselves epitomizes the transformation of Ukraine’s civilian technology industry into a defense powerhouse.
summary_public: An entrepreneur behind drones that make the final strike themselves epitomizes the transformation of Ukraine’s civilian technology industry into a defense powerhouse.

UA.label: positive
UA.evidence: transformation of Ukraine’s civilian technology industry into a defense powerhouse
